title: Talk to Brenda about SAT and AP money — Dec 2019 todos
html:
TL;DR

  • Late-2019 jumble: high school logistics (fbla printing, APUSH review, math, Huck Finn), wrestling, sleepover packing list, and a pointed mini-thesis on Jordan Cove ("investing in unsustainable future fossil fuels — devastation for little long term occurrences").
  • "Questions for Raissa" — first hint of someone he's interviewing about a foreign experience: "Would you do it again / Did you miss your family / Speak to me about where you stayed". Likely a study-abroad mentor / cousin he was modeling himself after.
  • Talk-to-maya note: "talk to maya/chats about what stays about their life? About being remembered" — early appearance of the legacy question template he'd later articulate explicitly in 2019 08 12 keep things simple / 2024 12 14 departing china.
  • "Get art of war back" — the Sun Tzu loan is a recurring teen-era artifact. Cross with grants pass teen era.
  • Note ID Ygonzalez123 floating in the middle is an old screenname — keep in mind for any cross-platform sleuthing.

Key quotes

"talk to maya/chats about what stays about their life? About being remembered"

"JORDAN COVE / -investing in unsustainable future fossil fuels / -great short term jobs and tax funds / -devastation for little long term occurrences"

"Questions for raissa: Would you do it again / Do you fee different / In what ways / Did you miss your family like you though you would"

Why it matters in the graph

  • Jordan Cove (the Pembina LNG export terminal proposed for southern OR through 2020) — Yahir is doing political-economic systems thinking at ~16, already weighing short-term jobs vs long-term ecosystem damage. Same shape as the 2021 12 04 capitalism climate essay (Jack Shultz's, but kept in his Drive).
  • The "Questions for Raissa" template is the exact same form he'd later use in 2024 04 09 jensen questions and 2026 01 13 rankett com meetup prep — he interviews people he wants to learn from.
  • Maya question prefigures the same "what makes a life big" theme in 2024 12 14 departing china and 2024 09 12 never forget.

Open questions

  • Who is Raissa? A study-abroad returnee mentor? Resolve disambiguation.
  • What was maya's response (if any) to the "what stays about their life" question?
  • Did the Jordan Cove POV ever crystallize into a written project?

Wikilinks

brenda aguilera · fbla · maya · legacy question · grants pass or · grants pass teen era · osu · yahir family
